title: chamaedrys capitata
intro: Chamaedrys capitata, also known as wood betony, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae), characterized by its hairy leaves and pinkish-purple flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Chamaedrys capitata include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause. Herbal preparations of Chamaedrys capitata typically involve infusions or tinctures of the leaves and flowers, which can be consumed as teas or added to remedies for various ailments.
